title: VoidSense
description: Bayesian AI survival assistant that learns your playstyle to predict death probability and provides personalized warnings when danger approaches.
body:
# VoidSense

**Stop dying to stupid stuff. This AI watches your back.**

Ever lose all your diamonds to lava because you got too greedy? Walk into a creeper while looking at your phone? Die in a cave because you forgot to eat? **VoidSense sees it coming.**

## What Does It Do?

VoidSense is like having a survival expert watching over your shoulder. It analyzes EVERYTHING about your situation and warns you when you're about to do something dumb:

- **"Bro, you have 3 hearts and there's a creeper behind you"**
- **"You've been mining for 2 hours, you're getting sloppy"**
- **"Your armor is about to break and you're surrounded"**

The warnings pop up on your screen with colors:
- **Yellow** = Be careful
- **Orange** = You should probably stop
- **Red** = YOU ARE ABOUT TO DIE

## The Cool Part: It Learns From YOU

Every time you die, VoidSense remembers. It figures out YOUR bad habits:

- Do you always die to lava? It'll warn you earlier near lava
- Keep getting killed by mobs at night? Extra alerts when it gets dark
- Die when your hunger is low? It tracks that too

**The more you play, the smarter it gets.**

## Setup (Easy - No Coding Required!)

### Step 1: Download the Companion App
Download **VoidSense-Setup.exe** from our [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/minecraftaimods/voidsense-companion/releases/latest) and run the installer. Just like any Windows app!

### Step 2: Install the Mod
1. Download VoidSense from this page
2. Put the .jar in your `.minecraft/mods/` folder
3. Make sure you have Fabric Loader + Fabric API

### Step 3: Play!
1. Start VoidSense from your Start Menu
2. Launch Minecraft
3. Warnings appear automatically!

**Pro Tip:** During installation, check "Start VoidSense when Windows starts" and it'll always be ready!

## What It Tracks

- Your health and hunger (obviously)
- How beat up your armor and tools are
- How dark it is where you're standing
- Hostile mobs nearby
- How long you've been playing (fatigue is real)
- What you're doing (mining, fighting, exploring)

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.4+
- Fabric Loader + Fabric API
- VoidSense Companion App (Windows)

## Works Everywhere

Client-side only! Use it on any server, even vanilla. Nobody will know you have an AI guardian angel.

## Learn More

Visit the official product page for more information, documentation, and support: **[VoidSense on MinecraftAIMods](https://minecraftaimods.com/void-sense)**
